title: Quantum Entanglement in Plain English
script_summary: This video demystifies quantum entanglement and clarifies misconceptions about faster-than-light communication.

segments.voiceover: Two particles share a spooky link — but what does that really mean?
This is quantum entanglement: when particles become interconnected, their states correlate, no matter the distance.
Einstein called it 'spooky action at a distance'. But there’s no communication, no teleportation here.
Bell tests confirm entanglement. They show particles act in sync, but can’t send information faster than light.
So, while entangled particles reveal astonishing truths about nature, they don’t break the speed limit of light.
Want to dive deeper into quantum mysteries? Like and follow for more science revelations!
